summary: Comprehensive testing of new Sector Rotation Picker feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI interactions verified — PICKER tab, RRG chart, quadrant filters, sector expansion with stock lists, and Refresh button all working correctly.

minor.issue: period='52wk' is not a standard yfinance period string (valid: 1d, 5d, 1mo, 3mo, 6mo, 1y, 2y, 5y, 10y, ytd, max). Currently works in practice but is fragile — recommend changing to '1y'.
period='10d' is not a standard yfinance period string. Recommend using '5d' or '1mo' instead.

issues: When 9 tabs + 1 divider are rendered, the tab bar requires horizontal scroll to reach PICKER on small screens. On 1920px desktop it's visible. Works correctly with overflow-x-auto.

action_items: Optional: Change period='52wk' to period='1y' in router.py line 104 for standards-compliant yfinance usage
Optional: Change period='10d' to period='5d' in router.py line 180 for standards-compliant yfinance usage
critical_code_review_comments: period='52wk' (line 104) and period='10d' (line 180) are non-standard yfinance period strings but work currently in practice — low risk but worth fixing for future yfinance version compatibility

The SECTOR_INDICES dictionary uses tickers that depend on NSE/yfinance availability — if any ticker becomes unavailable, that sector is silently dropped (handled by 'continue'). This is acceptable behavior but worth documenting.
In-memory _cache dict will be reset on server restart — no persistence. For production, consider Redis or MongoDB cache.
server.py is 11,260 lines — extremely large file. The sector_picker module is properly split into its own router which is good practice.
test_credentials: None required — no auth for sector picker endpoints
seed_data_creation: None — uses real yfinance data for NSE sectoral indices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sector Rotation Picker feature fully tested and working. Backend: GET /api/sector-picker/rrg returns 11 sectors with Leading/Improving/Weakening/Lagging quadrants and trail data. GET /api/sector-picker/stocks/{sector} returns top stocks with price/change/volume. DELETE /api/sector-picker/cache clears cache. Frontend: PICKER tab visible in right tab bar after RISK divider, SectorRotationPicker component loads with RRG SVG chart, quadrant filter cards (6 Leading, 1 Improving, 2 Weakening, 2 Lagging as of test time), expandable sector cards showing stock data. All interactions work correctly.

backend_tests: TestSectorPickerRRG::test_rrg_sector_fields - PASSED (all required fields: sector, rs_ratio, rs_momentum, quadrant, color, trail)
TestSectorPickerRRG::test_rrg_trail_structure - PASSED (trail has rs and rsm fields)
TestSectorPickerStocks::test_pharma_stocks_fields - PASSED (symbol, price, change_pct, volume, note present)
frontend_tests: RISK section divider visible in tab bar - PASS
Clicking tab-picker loads SectorRotationPicker component - PASS
RRG SVG chart visible with sector dots - PASS
Quadrant summary cards show correct counts (Leading:6, Improving:1, Weakening:2, Lagging:2) - PASS
Clicking sector-toggle-Pharma expands to show 10 stock rows - PASS
Stock rows show symbol, price, change_pct, volume, note - PASS
Clicking Leading quadrant filter shows 6 sectors - PASS
Show all button restores all 11 sectors - PASS
Clicking Lagging filter shows 2 sectors - PASS
Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-picker-btn') clickable and triggers data reload - PASS
